title: AI Radar Agent Input Schema
description: Scaffold only. This draft schema is not wired into the current runtime; current validation lives in Python code and tests.

dry_run.description: When true, generate local artifacts without publishing.

skip_llm.description: When true, collect evidence without calling the LLM.

replay_path.description: Optional local evidence JSON path for replay/debug runs.

search_providers.description: Provider names such as rss, bocha, and tavily.
